description_long: This jewelry object is composed of a cluster of faceted, translucent blue crystals, each with sharply defined geometric planes and crisp white edge highlights. The main crystal is tall and hexagonal, flanked by two smaller crystals that emerge from its base at different angles, creating a dynamic, naturalistic arrangement. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, with a subtle gradient of blue shades that suggest depth and internal clarity. The overall form is reminiscent of a stylized gemstone cluster, with a modern, geometric aesthetic. The object appears solid and dense, with no visible settings, clasps, or metallic components. Its striking color and crystalline structure make it visually prominent and suggest it is intended as a statement piece.
description: A cluster of faceted, translucent blue crystals with sharp geometric planes and a glossy finish, arranged in a modern, eye-catching design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the tallest central crystal flanked by two smaller crystals, all with sharp, well-defined edges and a vibrant blue color.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the height of the main crystal and the angular arrangement of the smaller crystals at its base.
description_view_2: A slightly rotated view reveals the depth and three-dimensionality of the cluster, highlighting the symmetry and spacing between the crystals.
description_view_3: This view shows the main crystal's angled facets and the way the smaller crystals project outward, giving a sense of dynamic structure.
